mapper.sql: id, emp_id, resign_type, resign_reason, expect_resign_date, approver_id, approve_time, approve_remark, status, actual_resign_date, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into employee_resignation (emp_id, resign_type, resign_reason, expect_resign_date, approver_id, approve_time, approve_remark, status, actual_resign_date, create_time, update_time) values (#{empId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{resignType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{resignReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expectResignDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{actualResignDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into employee_resignation
emp_id,
resign_type,
resign_reason,
expect_resign_date,
approver_id,
approve_time,
approve_remark,
status,
actual_resign_date,
create_time,
update_time,
#{empId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{resignType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{resignReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{expectResignDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},

mapper.update:
update employee_resignation
emp_id = #{empId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
resign_type = #{resignType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
resign_reason = #{resignReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expect_resign_date = #{expectResignDate,jdbcType=DATE},
approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
approve_remark = #{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
actual_resign_date = #{actualResignDate,jdbcType=DATE},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update employee_resignation set emp_id = #{empId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, resign_type = #{resignType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, resign_reason = #{resignReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expect_resign_date = #{expectResignDate,jdbcType=DATE}, approver_id = #{approverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, actual_resign_date = #{actualResignDate,jdbcType=DATE}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
